head.text: Throbbing headache in eyes and temples. Head hot. Throat very dry, pain on swallowing

stomach_abdomen.text: Feels sick, like vomiting. Griping in pit of stomach. No appetite. Belching and passing gas

female.text: Menses suppressed. Diminished sexual desire with weakness

extremities.text: Left knee stiff and painful. Feet swollen

dosing.notes: Sixth potency. Fresh juice is applied to ulcers and warts

keynotes.text: color="#800000">ARGEMONE MEXICANA Prickly Poppy Colicky cramp and spasm of bowels. Painful neuro-muscular conditions, preventing sleep. Rheumatic disease associated with Bright's disease (D. MacFarlan).
